problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
hypothesis: If Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells is applied to chemistry, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
